description: Forward signal from Congressional lobbying disclosures. 4 signal layers: SPIKE (client recent vs baseline), CLUSTER (3+ peers same issue), NEW ENTRANT (first-time lobbyist), BILL TRACKER (H.R.XXXX/S.XXXX extraction). S3-cache + Quiver fallback. Emits lobbying.crowd_signal.

schedule.description: Lobbying intel — daily 16 UTC (lobbying disclosures publish slowly so daily is plenty)
